expected_text: Hello, welcome to Infinia. I am ready to help you today.
ASR_text: Hello welcome to Incident EO. I am ready to help you today.

expected_text: My name is Ratan Jyoti, and I enjoy building practical artificial intelligence systems.
ASR_text: My name is Ratan Gyoti and I enjoy building practical artificial intelligence systems.
suspected_cause: Proper-name pronunciation caused Jyoti/Gyoti mismatch; otherwise sentence content was stable.

expected_text: Thank you for contacting customer support. I have reviewed your request and will guide you through the next steps.
ASR_text: Thank you for contacting customer support. I have reviewed your request and will guide you through the next steps.
suspected_cause: No WER error; audio stats show no clipping.

expected_text: Your order number is five eight two four, and it will arrive on July twenty-first.
ASR_text: Your order number is 5824 and it will arrive on July 21st.
suspected_cause: Whisper collapsed spoken digits/date into numeric forms while expected text uses words; evaluation normalization did not align number/date forms.
